[
  {
    "type": "mcq_single",
    "prompt": "Выберите правильное утверждение:",
    "choices": [
      { "id": "a", "text": "A number of students are studying in the library." },
      { "id": "b", "text": "The number of students is studying in the library." },
      { "id": "c", "text": "A number of students is studying in the library." },
      { "id": "d", "text": "The number of students are studying in the library." }
    ],
    "correct_answer": "a",
    "explanation": "«A number of» означает «несколько», поэтому глагол во множественном числе (are). «The number of» означает «количество», поэтому глагол в единственном числе.",
    "theory_block_id": "b6_quantity_of",
    "chapter_id": "en.grammar.noun_system_upgrade_countability.agreement_pain_points_each",
    "concept_id": "quantity_of_agreement",
    "difficulty": 2
  },
  {
    "type": "mcq_single",
    "prompt": "Какой вариант правильный?",
    "choices": [
      { "id": "a", "text": "Thirty percent of the water are polluted." },
      { "id": "b", "text": "Thirty percent of the water is polluted." },
      { "id": "c", "text": "Thirty percent of the water have been polluted." },
      { "id": "d", "text": "Thirty percent of the water were polluted." }
    ],
    "correct_answer": "b",
    "explanation": "С неисчисляемым существительным (water) после «percent of» глагол в единственном числе (is).",
    "theory_block_id": "b6_quantity_of",
    "chapter_id": "en.grammar.noun_system_upgrade_countability.agreement_pain_points_each",
    "concept_id": "quantity_of_agreement",
    "difficulty": 3
  },
  {
    "type": "mcq_single",
    "prompt": "Выберите правильное предложение:",
    "choices": [
      { "id": "a", "text": "A majority of the citizens want the new policy." },
      { "id": "b", "text": "A majority of the citizens wants the new policy." },
      { "id": "c", "text": "The majority of the citizens want the new policy." },
      { "id": "d", "text": "The majority of the citizens wants the new policy." }
    ],
    "correct_answer": "a",
    "explanation": "«A majority of» + существительное в множественном числе (citizens) требует глагола во множественном числе (want).",
    "theory_block_id": "b6_quantity_of",
    "chapter_id": "en.grammar.noun_system_upgrade_countability.agreement_pain_points_each",
    "concept_id": "quantity_of_agreement",

  },
  {

    "prompt": "Какой вариант верен?",

      { "id": "d", "text": "Half of the cake were missing." }
    ],
    "correct_answer": "b",
    "explanation": "С неисчисляемым существительным (cake) после «half of» глагол в единственном числе (is).",
    "theory_block_id": "b6_quantity_of",
    "chapter_id": "en.grammar.noun_system_upgrade_countability.agreement_pain_points_each",

  {
    "type": "mcq_single",
    "prompt": "Какой глагол правильно заменит пропуск?",
    "choices": [
      { "id": "a", "text": "A percentage of the data is accurate." },
      { "id": "b", "text": "A percentage of the data are accurate." },
      { "id": "c", "text": "The percentage of the data is accurate." },
      { "id": "d", "text": "The percentage of the data are accurate." }
    ],
    "correct_answer": "a",
    "explanation": "«A percentage of» + неисчисляемое (data) требует единственного числа (is), но так как data часто используется как мн.ч., здесь «a percentage of» требует множественного числа (are). Однако в контексте данных как неисчисляемого понятия (data as information) используется единственное число.",
    "theory_block_id": "b6_quantity_of",
    "chapter_id": "en.grammar.noun_system_upgrade_countability.agreement_pain_points_each",
    "concept_id": "quantity_of_agreement",

    ],
    "correct_answer": "c",
    "explanation": "«The number of» требует единственного числа (is), поэтому «are» — ошибка. Правильно: «The number of applicants is increasing».",
